targets.expr: avg by (ssid, bssid, freq) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{band="2.4 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"})
avg by (ssid, bssid, freq) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{band="5 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"})
topk(10, avg by (ssid, bssid, type) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{type=~".*AP.*", band="2.4 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"}))
topk(10, avg by (ssid, bssid, type) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{type=~".*AP.*", band="5 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"}))
avg by (ssid, bssid, type, freq) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{band="2.4 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"})
avg by (ssid, bssid, type, freq) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{band="5 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"})
avg by (ssid, bssid, freq) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{band="2.4 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"})
avg by (ssid, bssid, freq) (wifi_ap_signal_dbm{band="5 GHz", ssid=~"${ssid:regex}"})
